title: Integrated Applied Modeling and Communication · Worked Case: Sensitivity
summary: Answer an unfamiliar community planning question from raw requirements through a defensible recommendation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg sensitivity increment in an independently validated applied-math decision packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Change material inputs and assumptions to identify which conclusions remain stable.
Compare candidate models and choose the simplest one that preserves material behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Calculate Sensitivity evidence
steps.instruction: A measured quantity starts at 20 units, changes by −7 units, then by +4 units. Calculate the final quantity. Use the result to decide Sensitivity for an independently validated applied-math decision packet.
steps.why: The Sensitivity result for an independently validated applied-math decision packet is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.
